reviews.comment:
En el GPC no figura la estación de servicio YPF -  ACA-  Al llegar al lugar  el ingreso a la estación de servicio es muy estrecha / angosta/ chica/ etc.,  Sería lo ideal que se lo hicieran un poco más ancha., Ya que la misma está al costado de la Autopistas .,  Cabe destacar que la iluminación es muy precario, sería bueno que esté más iluminado.,
La atención de los playeros es muy buena.,

(Translated by Google)
The YPF - ACA gas station is not listed in the GPC. Upon arrival, the entrance to the gas station is very narrow/small/etc. It would be ideal if it were widened, as it is located next to the highway. It should also be noted that the lighting is very poor; it would be good if it were better illuminated. The service from the attendants is very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMybU1Uai13RRAB
